entry.title: Why I Left the Bay Area
entry.summary: I told people I chose to leave Silicon Valley. The truth is, I had 40 days to take apart a life I thought I was still building.

A routine.
A life that fit into the system.`),mdx("p",null,`Not perfect. Not extraordinary.
But stable in a way that felt\u2026 earned.`),mdx("p",null,"That\u2019s what made what happened next so disorienting."),mdx("p",null,"Because I wasn\u2019t trying to leave."),mdx("p",null,"I was still in the process of arriving."),mdx("h2",null,"The Shift"),mdx("p",null,"It didn\u2019t come as a single dramatic moment."),mdx("p",null,"More like a slow realization that something fundamental had changed."),mdx("p",null,`The company\u2019s direction shifted.

\u201CIt\u2019s a good opportunity.\u201D
\u201CBetter alignment long-term.\u201D`),mdx("p",null,"All of that was ",mdx("em",{parentName:"p"},"true"),"."),mdx("p",null,"None of that was the whole truth."),mdx("p",null,"Because the real feeling wasn\u2019t excitement."),mdx("p",null,"It was interruption."),mdx("p",null,"Like a sentence that ended halfway through."),mdx("h2",null,"The Story You Tell Yourself"),mdx("p",null,"There\u2019s a moment, in situations like this, where you make a choice:"),mdx("p",null,`Do you frame it as something that happened to you\u2014
or something you\u2019re choosing?`),mdx("p",null,"I chose the second."),mdx("p",null,`Not because it was fully accurate.
But because it was the only version that allowed me to move forward.`),mdx("p",null,"So I started doing what I\u2019ve always done:"),mdx("p",null,"Make sense of it."),mdx("p",null,"Singapore made sense."),mdx("p",null,`Asia made sense.
New markets, new energy, proximity to growth.`),mdx("p",null,"If I had to leave, then I would make it ",mdx("em",{parentName:"p"},"intentional"),"."),mdx("p",null,"That\u2019s how I processed it."),mdx("p",null,`Not by resisting the change\u2014
but by absorbing it into a narrative I could stand behind.`),mdx("h2",null,"What People Didn\u2019t See"),mdx("p",null,"From the outside, it looked like a bold move."),mdx("p",null,"Another chapter. Another city. Another step forward."),mdx("p",null,"What people didn\u2019t see was the compression."),mdx("p",null,"Years of effort condensed into a forced transition."),mdx("p",null,`The lack of closure.
The conversations that didn\u2019t happen.
The version of life that didn\u2019t get to fully play out.`),mdx("p",null,"There\u2019s a specific kind of weight to that."),mdx("p",null,"Not regret."),mdx("p",null,"But incompleteness."),mdx("h2",null,"What I Actually Left Behind"),mdx("p",null,"I didn\u2019t just leave a place."),mdx("p",null,"I left a version of myself that was still forming."),mdx("p",null,"The one who was:"),mdx("ul",null,mdx("li",{parentName:"ul"},"Getting more comfortable in ambiguity"),mdx("li",{parentName:"ul"},"Learning how to belong without needing constant validation"),mdx("li",{parentName:"ul"},"Starting to understand what kind of life he actually wanted")),mdx("p",null,"That version didn\u2019t fail."),mdx("p",null,"It just\u2026 didn\u2019t get to finish."),mdx("h2",null,"What This Chapter Really Means"),mdx("p",null,"For a long time, I thought this story was about leaving Silicon Valley."),mdx("p",null,"It\u2019s not."),mdx("p",null,"It\u2019s about losing control over timing."),mdx("p",null,`About being forced to move before you feel ready.
About realizing that not all transitions are clean or chosen.`),mdx("p",null,"And about something harder to admit:"),mdx("p",null,"Sometimes, you don\u2019t get to decide when a chapter ends."),mdx("p",null,"You only get to decide how you carry it forward."),mdx("hr",null),mdx("p",null,"If you ask me now why I left, I can give you a clean answer."),mdx("p",null,"Career. Geography. Opportunity."),mdx("p",null,"But the honest answer is simpler than that:"),mdx("p",null,"I left because staying was no longer an option."),mdx("p",null,`What came next\u2026

titles.en: Why I Left the Bay Area
titles.zh: Why I Left the Bay Area
titles.ja: なぜシリコンバレーを離れたのか

summaries.en: I told people I chose to leave Silicon Valley. The truth is, I had 40 days to take apart a life I thought I was still building.
summaries.zh: I told people I chose to leave Silicon Valley. The truth is, I had 40 days to take apart a life I thought I was still building.
summaries.ja: 自分で決めたつもりでいた。でも実際は、40日で一つの生活を手放すことになった話。
